quoteFirst: Three miles from these are the nine mile wells, where we arrived at
quoteLast: Here I found an officer and a party of Sepoys, but was informed by him, that my detachment was so numerous it would very soon drain the pits or wells he was posted at; and the next day not a drop of water was to be got from them.
